# americancloud_object_storage_unit (Resource)

An object storage unit — an S3-compatible storage account that holds buckets. Use its `access_key`/`secret_key` with any S3 client against the endpoint `https://a2-west.americancloud.com`. `max_size_gb` is updatable in place; changing the name replaces the unit.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "americancloud_object_storage_unit" "media" {
  name        = "mediaassets"
  max_size_gb = 100 # omit for unlimited
}

# The unit's S3 credentials are computed, sensitive outputs:
#   americancloud_object_storage_unit.media.access_key
#   americancloud_object_storage_unit.media.secret_key
# Use them with any S3 client against the endpoint:
#   https://a2-west.americancloud.com
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Storage unit name (alphanumeric). Changing it forces a new unit.

### Optional

- `max_size_gb` (Number) Storage quota for the unit, in gigabytes. Omit for unlimited; removing it lifts an existing limit. Updatable in place.

### Read-Only

- `access_key` (String, Sensitive) S3 access key for the unit. Sensitive — grants storage access.
- `created_at` (String) When the unit was created (RFC 3339).
- `id` (String) Storage unit identifier.
- `max_buckets` (Number) Maximum number of buckets the unit may hold (null means unlimited).
- `secret_key` (String, Sensitive) S3 secret key for the unit. Sensitive — grants storage access.
